value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Follow-up implementation + verification: added optional local OTLP span export in src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts (uses OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT or OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT with /v1/traces auto-append, OTEL_SERVICE_NAME override, PM_TELEMETRY_OTEL_DISABLED kill-switch) and covered with tests/unit/telemetry-runtime.spec.ts. Local OTEL smoke check passed with embedded collector (request_count=2, span_names=pm.command.init + pm.command.list-open). Remote stack verification after fresh CLI commands (list-open/context): Postgres telemetry_events 825->829, RabbitMQ publish/deliver_get 826->830 with queue drained (messages_ready=0), Prometheus pm_telemetry_ingested_events_total 803->807, Tempo tempo_distributor_spans_received_total 3873->3929, Alloy exporter_sent_spans_ratio_total=3929 + loki_source_docker_target_entries_total non-zero, Loki query returned recent POST /v1/events 200 lines. Grafana verification: datasources listed (Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Telemetry Postgres), health OK for Prometheus/Loki/Postgres, and Grafana proxy/ds-query calls returned live data for Prometheus metrics, Loki logs, Tempo trace search, and Postgres telemetry_events count; provisioned dashboard uid pm-cli-telemetry-overview present with telemetry panels backed by those datasources.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Added optional OTLP local span export in CLI telemetry runtime and validated complete remote observability ingestion path.
CLI can emit command telemetry to ingestion endpoint and optional local OTLP collectors while Grafana data sources show live data from all stack components.

Telemetry runtime now emits optional OTLP local spans with environment-based controls; local smoke and remote verification confirmed RabbitMQ/Postgres/Prometheus/Loki/Tempo/Alloy ingestion and Grafana data source/dashboard visibility.
